Name: GCP Monitor
Description: Show live metrics of Google Cloud Compute Engine VMs and Cloud SQL databases on a key. Alerts when the resource is down or has no data in the last minutes.

Actions.Name: VM / Cloud SQL
Actions.Tooltip: Monitor CPU, RAM, Disk (and Connections for Cloud SQL) of a GCP Compute Engine VM or Cloud SQL instance

Localization.Pick up to 2 metrics, or 3 with the name: Pick up to 2 metrics, or 3 with the name hidden.
Localization.Leave empty to auto-detect gcloud. On Co: Leave empty to auto-detect gcloud. On Compute Engine, RAM/Disk need the Ops Agent; Cloud SQL reports every metric natively.
